phase1.name: Push-up
phase1.form_cues: Hands shoulder-width, elbows 45° from body, lower chest to ~2 cm from floor, full lockout at top
phase1.progression: Standard → feet elevated → archer push-ups → add DB row superset

phase1.name: DB Goblet Squat
phase1.form_cues: Hold 1 DB at chest, feet shoulder-width, knees track over toes, sit back not just down, chest up
phase1.progression: 10 kg → 14 kg → 21 kg → pause at bottom 3 sec

phase1.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
phase1.form_cues: Hinge at hips, soft knee bend, DBs travel close to legs, feel hamstring stretch at bottom, drive hips forward at top

phase1.name: DB Bent-over Row
phase1.form_cues: Hinge 45°, DBs hang, pull elbows to hips, squeeze shoulder blades at top, controlled negative

phase1.name: DB Shoulder Press
phase1.form_cues: Seated or standing, DBs at ear height, press straight up, slight forward lean, no flare

phase1.name: DB Bicep Curl
phase1.form_cues: Elbows pinned to sides, full ROM, 3 sec negative, no body swing
phase1.progression: 8 kg → 12 kg → 16 kg → hammer curl superset

phase1.name: Plank
phase1.form_cues: Forearms down, body flat, glutes squeezed, hips don't sag or pike, breathe normally

phase1.name: Dead Bug
phase1.form_cues: Lower back pressed into mat, extend opposite arm and leg, breathe out on extension, never lose lower back contact
phase1.progression: Bodyweight → add 2 kg DB in extended hand

phase1.name: DB Lateral Raise
phase1.form_cues: Slight forward lean, raise to shoulder height, thumbs slightly down, 3 sec descent, no momentum
phase1.progression: 4 kg → 8 kg → 12 kg → 4 sec up / 4 sec down tempo

phase1.name: Hip Thrust (mat)
phase1.form_cues: Upper back on mat edge, feet flat, drive hips up squeezing glutes at top, hold 1 sec, lower controlled
phase1.progression: Bodyweight → DB on hips → two DBs → pause variant

phase2_upper.name: DB Bench Press
phase2_upper.form_cues: Lie on mat, DBs at chest, press up and slightly in, lower with control, slight arch in lower back
phase2_upper.progression: 10 kg → 14 kg → 18 kg → pause at chest 2 sec

phase2_upper.name: DB Row
phase2_upper.form_cues: Hinge 45°, pull elbows to hips, squeeze at top, 3 sec negative

phase2_upper.name: Incline Push-up
phase2_upper.form_cues: Hands on elevated surface (chair height), body straight, elbows 45° from body
phase2_upper.progression: Chair height → lower surface → deficit push-up

phase2_upper.name: DB Shoulder Press
phase2_upper.form_cues: DBs at ear height, press straight up, control the descent

phase2_upper.name: DB Lateral Raise
phase2_upper.form_cues: Slight forward lean, raise to shoulder height, 3 sec descent, no momentum

phase2_upper.name: DB Bicep Curl
phase2_upper.form_cues: Elbows pinned, full ROM, 3 sec negative

phase2_upper.name: DB Tricep Overhead Extension
phase2_upper.form_cues: Hold 1 DB with both hands overhead, elbows close to head, lower DB behind head, press back up

phase2_upper.name: Face Pull (towel/band)
phase2_upper.muscle_group: Rear deltoid, external rotators, upper traps
phase2_upper.form_cues: Pull to face level, elbows high and wide, external rotate at end of movement

phase2_lower.name: DB Goblet Squat
phase2_lower.form_cues: Hold 1 DB at chest, feet shoulder-width, knees track over toes, full depth, chest up

phase2_lower.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
phase2_lower.form_cues: Hinge at hips, feel hamstring stretch at bottom, drive hips forward

phase2_lower.name: DB Reverse Lunge
phase2_lower.form_cues: Step back, lower back knee toward floor, keep front shin vertical, push through front heel to return

phase2_lower.name: Hip Thrust
phase2_lower.form_cues: Upper back on mat, DB on hips, drive up, squeeze glutes at top, hold 1 sec
phase2_lower.progression: DB on hips: 12 kg → 16 kg → 21 kg

phase2_lower.name: DB Calf Raise
phase2_lower.form_cues: Stand on edge of step, full range of motion, hold at top 1 sec

phase2_lower.name: Plank
phase2_lower.form_cues: Forearms down, body flat, glutes squeezed, breathe normally
phase2_lower.progression: 60 sec → RKC plank → plank with reach

phase2_lower.name: Hanging Leg Raise
phase2_lower.form_cues: Hang from bar, raise legs to 90°, control the descent, don't swing
phase2_lower.progression: Knee raises → straight leg raises → L-sit hold

phase2_lower.name: Bicycle Crunches
phase2_lower.form_cues: Hands behind head, rotate elbow to opposite knee, extend other leg, slow and controlled
phase2_lower.progression: Slow tempo → add hold at peak contraction
